content.t: KRAenhancedcollectionfromdebt programmes on non-compliant taxpayers; collecting total of Shs141.261 billion in FY 2024/2025. This performance is attributable to follow-ups on demand notices and the debt instalment plans agreed upon with taxpayers_
Taxation of the digital economy for the period under review recorded performance rate of after netting billion which translates to a 32% growth from the Sh1o.8 billion collected in FY 2023/24_

The programme enabled KRA to collect Sh28.5 billion in revenue through launch of the Electronic Rental Income Tax System (eRITS), recruitment of landlords under the Monthly Rental Income (MRI) programme through taxpayer mapping process (Block Management System BMS) and recruitment of additional taxpayers and provision of additional tax obligations based on their income.

KRA's interventions to combat corruption and seal revenue leakages include implementation of the iWhistle programme which facilitated collection of Kshs. 6.87 Billion from 821 cases reported anonymously; profiling of tax evaders and review of refunds and debt management processes.

Integration of Betting and Gaming Companies into KRA tax system. The integration has given KRA real-time access to 141 companies in the gaming and betting sector. This enabled both Excise Tax on betting services and Betting Tax to surpass the FY 2024/25 target.

The framework enhanced revenue collection from Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR), which facilitated the release of Sh15.296 billion for collection from 97 concluded cases. KRA also collected Sh65.09 billion through litigation processes. This translates to performance rate of 1959.
